name: 字游間
description: Japanese typeface adjustment of inter-character spacing that accounts for the visual weight and shape of adjacent characters. This micrometric adjustment is essential in justified typography. Different character pairs require different spacing to achieve optical equilibrium.
description_ja: Japanese typeface adjustment of inter-character spacing that accounts for the visual weight and shape of adjacent characters. This micrometric adjustment is essential in justified typography. Different character pairs require different spacing to achieve optical equilibrium.
application_example_ja: 字游間は現代の書籍デザインとWebで活用される基本的な原理。

name: 字面
description: The visible surface area of a character design, excluding white space within or around the glyph. Two fonts with identical point sizes may have dramatically different perceived sizes due to character face proportion.
description_ja: The visible surface area of a character design, excluding white space within or around the glyph. Two fonts with identical point sizes may have dramatically different perceived sizes due to character face proportion.
application_example_ja: 字面は現代の書籍デザインとWebで活用される基本的な原理。

name: フトコロ
description: The enclosed white space within and around character strokes, particularly important in Japanese typographic texture. Large, open counters increase legibility; closed counters create density.
description_ja: The enclosed white space within and around character strokes, particularly important in Japanese typographic texture. Large, open counters increase legibility; closed counters create density.
application_example_ja: フトコロは現代の書籍デザインとWebで活用される基本的な原理。

name: 文字面
description: The proportional relationship between character width and height within the type design system. Character face proportion affects visual hierarchy, density, and reading color.
description_ja: The proportional relationship between character width and height within the type design system. Character face proportion affects visual hierarchy, density, and reading color.
application_example_ja: 文字面は現代の書籍デザインとWebで活用される基本的な原理。

name: 字送り
description: The total width allocated to each character in a font design, including both character width and side bearings. Proper adjustment affects text color and visual rhythm.
description_ja: The total width allocated to each character in a font design, including both character width and side bearings. Proper adjustment affects text color and visual rhythm.
application_example_ja: 字送りは現代の書籍デザインとWebで活用される基本的な原理。

name: 行送り
description: The vertical distance from the baseline of one line to the baseline of the next line. Proper leading is critical for readability, especially in long-form reading.
description_ja: The vertical distance from the baseline of one line to the baseline of the next line. Proper leading is critical for readability, especially in long-form reading.
application_example_ja: 行送りは現代の書籍デザインとWebで活用される基本的な原理。

name: ベタ組み
description: Typography set with minimal or no leading, creating a dense, tightly-packed text block. Traditional East Asian typography often used solid composition.
description_ja: Typography set with minimal or no leading, creating a dense, tightly-packed text block. Traditional East Asian typography often used solid composition.
application_example_ja: ベタ組みは現代の書籍デザインとWebで活用される基本的な原理。

name: 詰め組み

description_ja: Strategic reduction of inter-character and inter-line spacing to create compressed, visually unified text. Often used in headlines and advertisements.
application_example_ja: 詰め組みは現代の書籍デザインとWebで活用される基本的な原理。

name: アキ組み

description_ja: Deliberate expansion of inter-character and inter-line spacing to create airy, spacious composition. Emphasizes legibility and visual breathing room.
application_example_ja: アキ組みは現代の書籍デザインとWebで活用される基本的な原理。

description_ja: Ruby annotation system where single ruby character corresponds to one base character. Maintains clear one-to-one correspondence.
application_example_ja: モノルビは現代の書籍デザインとWebで活用される基本的な原理。
